description: This file defines a React Native screen component called SimulationScreen, which manages a simulation interface with chat-like interactions, including triggering a backend smoke-flow test sequence. It includes UI layout, state management, API calls, and navigation handling.

methods.name: pushLog
methods.description: Adds a log entry with a timestamp to the smokeLog state array.

methods.name: runSmokeFlow
methods.description: Executes a sequence of API calls to simulate a backend smoke test, updating the smoke log accordingly. Handles authentication, error catching, and loading state.

methods.name: respond
methods.description: Updates the turns state with a user question and a follow-up AI response.
